## Domain

What domain should this vault template support?

## Reusable Knowledge

What should the memory/rule layers capture?

## Suggested Layers

- [ ] Change log
- [ ] Memories
- [ ] Intermediate rules
- [ ] Workflow governance
- [ ] Final generalized rules
- [ ] Supervision / no-regression
- [ ] Conflicts
- [ ] Limited rules

## Safety Notes

Could this domain involve private data, regulated content, or sensitive records?
